message:
fix(ui): use unicode display width for breadcrumb measurement

Switch from simple char count to UnicodeWidthStr::width() for
measuring breadcrumb text width. This ensures accurate cursor
positioning and hit areas for CJK characters, emoji, and other
wide characters that occupy 2 terminal columns.

- Import unicode_width::UnicodeWidthStr
- Replace s.chars().count() with s.width()
- Fixes misaligned click targets on non-ASCII text

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
